top_stories.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
top_stories.description: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.
top_stories.author: Connie Loizos
top_stories.content: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

top_stories.title: Exclusive: AirOps targets emerging AI search market with autonomous content optimization agent
top_stories.description: AirOps, the business name of Rivington Labs Inc., today introduced Quill, an artificial intelligence agent designed to help brands maintain visibility in generative AI search engines by continuously monitoring, updating and creating content. The San Francisco-based startup is building its business on the broader shift from traditional search engine optimization to what is increasingly being […] The post Exclusive: AirOps targets emerging AI search market with autonomous content optimization...

top_stories.title: From siloed data to unified insights: Cross-account Athena Access for Amazon Quick
top_stories.description: Today, we're announcing cross-account Athena access for Amazon Quick. With this feature, customers can query Athena data in other AWS accounts using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role chaining, with query costs billed to the account where the data resides.
top_stories.author: Vignessh Baskaran
top_stories.content: Today, we're announcing cross-account Athena access for Amazon Quick. With this feature, customers can query Athena data in other AWS accounts using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role chaining, with query costs billed to the account where the data resides.

top_stories.title: Clinical trial finds no difference in fluid treatment options for pediatric sepsis
top_stories.description: NIH-supported study is largest ever to compare fluid interventions to prevent major kidney damage in children treated for septic shock.
top_stories.content: NIH-supported study is largest ever to compare fluid interventions to prevent major kidney damage in children treated for septic shock.

top_stories.title: How to Build an MCP Style Routed AI Agent System with Dynamic Tool Exposure Planning, Execution, and Context Injection
top_stories.description: In this tutorial, we build a fully functional MCP-style routed agent system from scratch, combining tool discovery, intelligent routing, structured planning, and execution into a single cohesive workflow.
